docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF ASSIGNMENT OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 15152095) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARROW FINANCIAL SERVICES LLC ASSIGNEE OF WASHINGTON MUTUAL BANK AS TO ASSIGNEE LVNV FUNDING LLC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-27-2010 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
